```

DIRDEPS = \
	include \
	include/xlocale \
	lib/${CSU_DIR} \
	lib/libc \
	lib/libcompiler_rt \


.include <dirdeps.mk>

.if ${DEP_RELDIR} == ${_DEP_RELDIR}
# local dependencies - needed for -jN in clean tree
.endif

```

--- RESPONSE ---


ACTION: EDIT_FILE bin/chflags/Makefile
OLD:
<<<
PROG=	chflags
BINDIR?=	/usr/bin
BINOWN?=	root
BINGRP?=	wheel
BINMODE?=	555

CARGO?=		cargo
CARGO_TARGET_DIR?=	${.OBJDIR}/cargo-target
.ifndef CARGO_TARGET_DIR
CARGO_TARGET_DIR=	${.CURDIR}/cargo-target
.endif
>>>
NEW:
<<<
PROG=	chflags
BINDIR?=	/usr/bin
BINOWN?=	root
BINGRP?=	wheel
BINMODE?=	555

CARGO?=		cargo
CARGO_TARGET_DIR=	${.CURDIR}/cargo-target
>>>
